mapper.select: SELECT p.PROJECT_ID ,u.USER_ID ,u.USER_NAME ,p.ROLE_ID FROM PROJECT_MEMBER p INNER JOIN TEAM_MEMBER t ON p.TEAM_MEMBER_ID = t.TEAM_MEMBER_ID INNER JOIN USERS u ON t.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE p.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}

SELECT a.milestone_id, a.version_id, a.title, a.description, a.manager_id, b.user_name AS managerName, a.status_code, a.status_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.created_at FROM milestone a LEFT OUTER JOIN users b ON a.manager_id = b.user_id WHERE a.milestone_id = #{milestoneId}

SELECT -- 마일스톤 테이블 (M) M.MILESTONE_ID, M.TITLE AS MILESTONE_TITLE, M.START_DATE, M.END_DATE, M.STATUS_CODE,
-- 유저 테이블 (U)에서 실제 담당자 이름 가져오기 ⭐️ U.USER_NAME AS MANAGER_NAME,
-- 마일스톤 전체 진행률 (하위 일감들의 평균 진척도 계산) NVL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(PROGRESS_RATE)) FROM ISSUE WHERE MILESTONE_ID = M.MILESTONE_ID ), 0) AS TOTAL_PROGRESS_RATE,
-- 일감 테이블 (I) I.ISSUE_ID, I.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, I.ISSUE_STATUS_ID, I.DESCRIPTION AS ISSUE_DESCRIPTION, I.PROGRESS_RATE AS ISSUE_PROGRESS_RATE
FROM MILESTONE M LEFT OUTER JOIN USERS U ON M.MANAGER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ISSUE I ON M.MILESTONE_ID = I.MILESTONE_ID
AND M.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}
AND M.START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND M.END_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND M.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{managerName} || '%'
AND M.STATUS_CODE = #{statusCode}
ORDER BY M.START_DATE DESC, I.ISSUE_ID ASC

SELECT i.issue_id ,i.title ,i.version_id ,i.progress_rate ,u.user_name AS assigneeName ,v.version_name ,g.status_name AS issueStatusName FROM ISSUE i LEFT JOIN PROJECT_VERSION v ON i.VERSION_ID = v.VERSION_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS g ON i.ISSUE_STATUS_ID = g.ISSUE_STATUS_ID LEFT JOIN USERS u ON i.ASSIGNEE_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE i.MILESTONE_ID = #{milestoneId}
